content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "BULLISH",
    "reasoning": "Broad market firm with Nifty +0.54%, Realty +2.28%, Pharma +1.08%, Energy +0.90%, Metal +0.95% leading; only IT lagging. VIX cooling slightly to 18.39. Strong post-results momentum across the book (BAJFINANCE +3.7%, ADANIPORTS +4.3%, BANDHANBNK +5.4%, HAL +5.2%, SUNPHARMA +2.4%). Tape is risk-on — focus is trailing SLs on winners and avoiding cluster-stack on new entries.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24000,
      "nifty_resistance": 24300
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1035.00,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+6% winner, CMP 1047.50, intraday VWAP 1051. Trail SL from 1030 to 1035 (still 1.2% below CMP — leaves room for normal chop, locks in ~5.2% gain). Q4 beat thesis intact, sub-1% GNPA, MOFSL Buy. Holding into target 1110."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Macro hedge holding -2.2%. SL at 119 (below 52w range support area). Risk-on tape today is unfavorable for gold but VIX still elevated and crude spiking; hedge value remains. No SL change — already 2.7% below CMP, well-positioned."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1795.00,
      "new_target": 1850.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Stored SL 1810 is currently ABOVE intraday low 1810 — i.e., already nearly at CMP 1820.50. Per TRAIL-GAP DISCIPLINE, an SL flush with CMP is a self-stopout. Loosening SL is NOT permitted by the engine, so I cannot fix this via MODIFY (1795 < 1810 will be rejected). Re-emitting same SL 1810 is no-op. Better path: book the +5% gain explicitly. Switching to EXIT below."
    },
    {
      "action": "EXIT",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 30,
      "order_type": "MARKET",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+5% winner at INR 1820.50 vs entry 1734. SL is currently at 1810 which is only 0.6% below CMP — TRAIL-GAP violation, and engine will reject any loosening. Also Q4 results May 19 is a binary event within the 15-session window, and stock is at 52w high (1851) with limited remaining target room (target 1850 nearly hit). Book the gain cleanly. ~+₹2,600 realized."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PHARMABEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 23.85,
      "new_target": 25.20,
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Stored SL 23.85 is already at CMP 24.11 minus ~1.1% — barely above breakeven entry 23.65. No change needed; emitting HOLD instead via position_actions. Removing this MODIFY."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PHARMABEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Reverting to HOLD — stored SL 23.85 is appropriate given CMP 24.11 (1.1% gap). Sun Pharma May 19 binary event affects ETF NAV (Sun is top weight) but ETF diversification cushions. No-op MODIFY would be wasted signal."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "BAJFINANCE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 950.00,
      "new_target": 990.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Stored SL 948 is already at breakeven (entry 944). CMP 964.70, P&L +2.2%. Trail SL from 948 to 950 — locks in tiny gain, sits 1.5% below CMP. R:R from current: (990-964.70)/(964.70-950) = 25.3/14.7 = 1.72. Q4 PAT +23%, AUM Rs 5L cr milestone, NBFC sector strong."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1715.00,
      "new_target": 1790.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Stored SL 1715, CMP 1733. Per TRAIL-GAP DISCIPLINE, 1715 is only 1.0% below CMP — already adequately tight. Stock at 52w high zone (1748 intraday high), Q4 beat, FY27 guidance solid. No-op — converting to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Stored SL 1715 stays — sits 1.0% below CMP 1733, locks in breakeven+. No change needed. Target 1790 within reach if 52w high (1748) breaks decisively."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GESHIP",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Marginal -0.3%, SL 1510 (-1.8% from CMP 1538). Q4 results May 8 (~4 sessions away) is a binary event per BINARY-EVENT DISCIPLINE. Position is small (~4.6% of portfolio), well within event-trade size. Today's intraday gave back from 1600 high to 1538 — choppy. SL adequately tight at 1510. Holding."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MARUTI",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Down -1.9% from entry 13800 (CMP 13644); intraday spiked to 13976 then faded. SL 13400 = -1.8% from current — risk budget intact. Q4 net profit -6.4% YoY (margin pressure) is real near-term concern but Rs 140/share dividend, record vol, GST tailwind support. Holding to SL or 14500."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Marginally negative -0.3%. CMP 209, SL 202 (-3.3%). Q4 PAT +69%, NIM +30bp, ICICI 10% stake clearance — thesis intact. Fresh 52w high today on 8.2x volume; intraday faded from 212.66 high. Letting setup play out, SL at 202 leaves room."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 4480.00,
      "new_target": 4790.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Entry 4575, CMP 4577, +0.04%. Intraday surge to 4590 high on BHEL read-through. Tightening SL from 4440 (-3.0%) to 4480 (-2.1% from CMP) — better risk budget for ~4.5% position. Risk budget: 4.5% × 2.1% = 0.094% of portfolio (well within 0.5% cap). R:R from CMP: (4790-4577)/(4577-4480) = 213/97 = 2.20."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1035.00,
      "reasoning": "Lock in ~5.2% on a +6% winner; SL 1.2% below CMP."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Macro hedge; SL at 119 already 2.7% below CMP."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "current_action": "EXIT",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Book +5% gain; current SL 1810 is only 0.6% below CMP (trail-gap violation, cannot loosen) and Q4 binary May 19 within hold window. Clean exit at 52w high zone."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PHARMABEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Stored SL 23.85 already trails breakeven; no-op MODIFY avoided."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BAJFINANCE",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 950.00,
      "reasoning": "Nudge SL to 950 (above entry 944); 1.5% below CMP."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1715 already tight (1.0% below CMP); target 1790 in reach."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GESHIP",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Q4 binary May 8 — small position, SL 1510 adequate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "MARUTI",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Mild drawdown; SL 13400 within risk budget; thesis intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Q4 beat thesis, breakout day fading slightly; SL 202 leaves room."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 4480.00,
      "reasoning": "Tighten from 4440 to 4480 to align position risk to budget."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "BHEL +14.5% post-Q4 — too extended for entry. RRKABEL fresh 52w high but capital-goods cluster (HAL already held); skip to avoid cluster stack. ANANTRAJ pending order at 506 still OPEN — let it work, do not duplicate. SYNGENE/LALPATHLAB/CONCORDBIO post-result moves already extended. KOTAKBANK could become interesting on basing — watching. BAJAJ-AUTO gap-up too vertical. MANAPPURAM/EXIDEIND/GODREJPROP awaiting Q4 prints — event risk too tight. CESC, ADANIGREEN — already heavy in adjacent themes (ADANIPORTS held); cluster discipline says no.",
  "portfolio_notes": "10 holdings, 52% deployed, ample dry powder (₹483K cash). Book is well-diversified across pharma, financials, ports, defence, auto, shipping, real-estate-pending, gold hedge. Cluster check: Financials (PNBHOUSING + BAJFINANCE + BANDHANBNK) ~17% of capital — within 35% cap but watch. Today's primary work is risk management: trailing SLs on winners (PNBHOUSING, BAJFINANCE, HAL) and exiting SUNPHARMA cleanly to avoid SL-flush + binary risk. Not adding new entries — pending ANANTRAJ order is enough new exposure for this session, and most extended movers (BHEL, BANDHANBNK 8x vol, RRKABEL) are post-breakout chase territory. Day 15/180, cumulative +0.64% — steady, no need to force trades."
}
